name: save_child_profile
description: Save structured child profile data to the backend database. Call this tool ONLY after collecting all required fields: name, age, gender (boy or girl), order_type (story book or movie), and interests (array of strings). The system will return a unique order ID starting with OUM.

request_body_schema.description:
Use this tool to save a structured child profile to the backend database.

Call this tool ONLY after collecting all required fields from the user:
- name
- age
- gender (must be "boy" or "girl")
- order_type (must be "story book" or "movie")
- interests (must be an array of strings)

Do not summarize.
Do not send free text.
Send structured JSON exactly matching the defined schema.
Only call the tool once all fields are clearly provided.

All fields are required.
If any required field is missing, ask the user for clarification before calling the tool.
Only call the tool once all values are confidently extracted.

The response will contain an order_id starting with 'OUM' — always tell the user their order ID after saving.

properties.description:
The child's first name exactly as provided by the user.
Do not include extra words.
Return only the name string.

The child's age as a positive integer in years (1–18).
Do not include text such as "years old".
Return only the number.

The child category corresponding to gender.
Must be either "boy" or "girl".
Use "boy" if gender is male.
Use "girl" if gender is female.

The type of order the user wants.
Must be either "story book" or "movie".
Ask the user whether they want a story book or a movie if not already specified.

A list of the child's interests or hobbies mentioned by the user.
Each interest must be a separate string element in the array.
Do not combine multiple interests into one string.
Return an empty array if none are provided.
Maximum 10 interests.

items.description:
A single interest or hobby of the child as a short descriptive word or phrase (e.g., "football", "drawing", "robots").
Do not include multiple interests in one string.
Do not include full sentences.
